title: Issue #89 GitLab provider hardening
description: Consume #89 Issue Fix Request with Roadmap-Sliced Development and align GitLab provider hardening gaps with the current GitHub baseline.

decisions.q: 当前 roadmap 的发布边界是什么？
decisions.answer: 以 GitHub 侧当前实现为事实 baseline，对齐 GitLab provider 的全量可用链路；无法回避的平台差异记录为窄例外。
decisions.note: 目标不是第一版/第二版式切断，而是用有序 slice 分阶段实现同一个完整目标，避免后续 agent 误判为 job done。

1-1.label: 消费 #89 request 并建立 roadmap 分支

decisions.q: 如何消费 #89 的 Issue Fix Request？
decisions.answer: 复用 source issue #89 作为 carrier，在 dedicated roadmap branch 上执行 Roadmap-Sliced Development，不创建新的独立 Issue Fix Request。
decisions.note: #89 已有 structured issue-fix-request comment ifr_triage_6b1bcf67fbf9；后续 PR closeout 和 source issue 生命周期都围绕 #89 回放。

1-1-1.label: 记录 Issue Fix Request 消费证据
1-1-1.notes: Verification gate: Issue Fix Request carrier exists on #89, branch zjal/issue-89-gitlab-provider-hardening created, process roadmap initialized, #89 gaps mapped to executable leaf nodes, and Roadmap-Sliced consumption evidence appended to #89. Evidence: Issue Fix Request https://github.com/jununfly/ZAgenticLoop/issues/89#issuecomment-4934172412; start command https://github.com/jununfly/ZAgenticLoop/issues/89#issuecomment-4934184631; consumed comment https://github.com/jununfly/ZAgenticLoop/issues/89#issuecomment-4934232352; branch zjal/issue-89-gitlab-provider-hardening.

1-2-1.label: GitLab CI stage 配置化
1-2-1.notes: Commit intent: make GitLab CI stage configurable at generation time. Implemented --gitlab-stage for zj-loop-init --add/--upgrade gitlab-ci; GitLab templates now render __ZJ_LOOP_GITLAB_STAGE__ into root stages and job stage fields; README/README.zh-CN/Quickstart document using --gitlab-stage Fallback for fixed-stage GitLab projects. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-init; npm run check:zj-loop-init; npm run test:generated-bundle-release-gate; git diff --check.
